writer.name: 乔纳森·莫斯托 Jonathan Mostow

director.name: 乔纳森·莫斯托 Jonathan Mostow

this_title: Phoenix - the Migrant Offshore Aid Station
introduction: Jonathan Mostow is on board to write and direct a biopic about American businessman and humanitarian Chris Catrambone, founder of the Migrant Offshore Aid Station (MOAS). Established in 2013, MOAS has provided humanitarian aid and services to the most vulnerable people around the world, reaching hundreds of thousands to date. Catrambone’s self-financed efforts have resulted in the rescue of 40,000 refugees at sea.A young American hero spends millions of dollars rescuing stranded migrants from the Mediterranean Sea as they narrowly escape violence, enslavement, and drowning at the hands of brutal human traffickers and lawless regimes.
chinese_title: Phoenix - the Migrant Offshore Aid Station
